prompt: Ultra-photorealistic cinematic fashion portrait of a young woman in a flowing blush-pink floral midi dress strolling through a charming cobblestone street in a historic European town at sunset. She pauses beside an ornate stone railing, glancing back toward the camera with a radiant smile, one hand lightly touching her hair as the dress sways in the evening breeze. Warm golden sunlight wraps around her silhouette, creating delicate highlights along her face and shoulders. Elegant cafés and softly glowing lanterns blur into creamy bokeh in the background. Luxury magazine editorial styling, cinematic depth of field, natural motion, subtle film texture, storytelling composition, realistic skin details, premium fashion photography, golden-hour atmosphere, vertical 4:5.
promptEn: Ultra-photorealistic cinematic fashion portrait of a young woman in a flowing blush-pink floral midi dress strolling through a charming cobblestone street in a historic European town at sunset. She pauses beside an ornate stone railing, glancing back toward the camera with a radiant smile, one hand lightly touching her hair as the dress sways in the evening breeze. Warm golden sunlight wraps around her silhouette, creating delicate highlights along her face and shoulders. Elegant cafés and softly glowing lanterns blur into creamy bokeh in the background. Luxury magazine editorial styling, cinematic depth of field, natural motion, subtle film texture, storytelling composition, realistic skin details, premium fashion photography, golden-hour atmosphere, vertical 4:5.
promptZh: 超写实电影感时尚人像，画面中一位 年轻女性 身着飘逸的 淡粉色碎花中长裙，漫步在 欧洲历史古镇 迷人的鹅卵石街道上，时间为日落时分。她停在装饰华丽的石栏杆旁，回头看向镜头，脸上带着灿烂的笑容，一只手轻轻抚摸着头发，裙摆在晚风中摇曳。温暖的金色阳光包裹着她的轮廓，在脸部和肩部勾勒出细腻的高光。背景中优雅的咖啡馆和柔和发光的灯笼虚化成奶油般的背景光斑。奢华杂志编辑风格，电影级景深，自然动态，细腻胶片质感，叙事性构图，逼真的皮肤细节，高端时尚摄影，黄金时刻氛围，竖构图 4:5。
